productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarglide + Shield Grey Sports Shoes
description: An offshoot of the LunarGlide, this nike LunarGlide+ 3 running shoe offers absolute cushioned comfort, better Fit and dynamic support. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and others to track your fitness regimeUpperBreathable mesh upper with a nearly seamless construction for ample ventilation and reduced irritationInner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfortExtended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfoot and heelSymmetrical lace-up system for a snug fitMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortPerforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for a comfortable, snug fitMidsoleFitSole cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionLunarlon dynamic support system to adapt to your stridePadded footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleEnvironmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityCarbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistanceWaffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
